en: Well, if I say yes, I'm an idiot, right?
ko: 그래, 내가 예스라고 하면 나는 바보지, 맞지?

en: You're an idiot anyway. But if you say you get along with your parents, well, you're a liar too.
You know something, man? If we weren't in school right now, I'd waste you.
Can you hear this? You want me to turn it up?
I don't like my parents either. I mean, I don't... You know, I don't...
I don't... I don't get along with them.
I mean, their idea of, you know, parental compassion is just, you know...
ko: 그들의 부모의 연민이라는 건, 그냥, 너 알잖아...

en: Wacko, you know? Do it. Yeah.
You are a parent's wet dream, okay?
Well, that's the problem. Look, I could see you getting all bunged up for them making you wear these kind of clothes.
But face it, you're a neo-Maxi-Zoom-Dweeby.
